rent.note: furnished 1BR in Las Canteras or Vegueta; ~€13.8/m² avg; 80m² ~€1,100

utilities.note: electric + water + internet; mild climate keeps A/C use low

diningOut.note: dining out $425/mo avg; cafes, fish restaurants, local bars

transit.note: monthly bus pass ~€30; walkable nomad areas

coworking.note: hot-desk monthly; several established nomad spaces

misc.note: gym, beach activities, toiletries, entertainment, buffer

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Canaries have winter peak (European escapees) plus summer.

evidence.claim: Las Palmas solo total incl rent ~$1,766/mo (Jan 2026)
evidence.quote: For a solo digital nomad, estimated monthly costs are $840 (excluding rent), and $1,766 including rent
Rent in Las Palmas de Gran Canaria averaged €13.8 per m² in the same month, so an 80 m² apartment comes in at about €1,100 per month
Monthly groceries cost $229, while dining out averages $425

evidence.claim: Las Palmas considerably cheaper than Madrid/Barcelona for rent
evidence.quote: Compared with Madrid or Barcelona, rental prices are considerably lower
